pages.title: Welcome! | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: Main landing page for BWS API documentation, introducing Blockchain Web Services platform that makes blockchain accessible without Web3 expertise. Covers Platform APIs (IPFS, Blockchain Save/Hash, NFT.zK) and Marketplace Solutions (Badges, Game Cube, ESG Credits, X Bot), plus Developer Grants program with bounty payments and API fee rewards.
useCases: Store data on blockchain with Certificate of Trust for enhanced transparency
Upload images and JSON files to IPFS network for decentralized storage
Create NFTs easily and transfer ownership to non-blockchain-expert users
Issue secure digital credentials on blockchain with Blockchain Badges
Engage sports fans with NFT-based game where they own field sections and earn rewards
pages.fullContent: BWS API Docs Ctrl k Contact Us Create Account Sign In More Welcome! Developer Grants Quick Start Platform Fees API How Tos Certificate Of Trust Media Assets PLATFORM APIs BWS.IPFS.Upload BWS.Blockchain.Save BWS.Blockchain.Hash BWS.NFT.zK Marketplace Solutions BWS.Blockchain.Badges BWS.NFT.GameCube BWS.ESG.Credits TELEGRAM BOTS X BOT Powered by GitBook On this page Platform API Marketplace Solutions BWS Developer Grants Was this helpful? Copy Welcome! Blockchain Web Services documentation. Blockchain Web Services (aka BWS) aims to transform the blockchain market by making innovative solutions accessible to a broad audience, including those without technical or Web3 experience. Read Blockchain Web Services's White Paper . NFT Game Cube's new marketplace solution launch! BWS’s NFT Game Cube lets sports fans own digital assets tied to specific sections of a sports field—not only football but chess, tennis, cricket, and many more. As real-time events unfold at their location during the game, fans earn points, unlocking exciting rewards while creating a new revenue stream for sports clubs, former athletes, influencers, and anyone with a market in the sports industry. Read the Launch Pitch . Platform API By leveraging the Blockchain Web Services API, developers can seamlessly integrate blockchain technology into their offerings, providing their target customers with blockchain innovative solutions without requiring Web3 expertise. Blockchain Save Easily and affordably store data on the blockchain while receiving a Certificate of Trust for enhanced transparency. Blockchain Hash A single API call to save data to the blockchain without passing your wallet or managing the transaction fees. IPFS Effortlessly upload images and JSON files to the IPFS network and use our IPFS gateway for reliable access. NFT.zk This solution is designed to create NFTs easily but also to transfer the ownership to non-blockchain-experts users that will now be able to experience the NFT revolution too. Marketplace Solutions Blockchain Web Services is not just an API but a set of platform protocols and development practices to enable the community to contribute and grow the solutions offering. The following solutions offer mass market blockchain use cases targeting end-customers without Web3 know-how or setup. Blockchain Badges Blockchain Badges elevate your credentialing system with secure, immutable digital recognition on the blockchain. NFT Game Cube Engage your fans and get a new revenue stream for your Sports Club by combining NFTs and Machine Learning. ESG Credits Assists financial institutions and system integrators in delivering environmental impact reporting to their digital channels. X Bot A Telegram bot that helps community groups boost engagement on X (formerly Twitter) and track project's KOLs. BWS Developer Grants Recognizing the importance of building a vibrant developer ecosystem, we are excited to introduce the BWS Developer Grants—a program designed to incentivize developers to create tools and applications on top of our platform protocols, rewarding them for their contributions. The initiative will maintain a development fund to support growth efforts, focusing on fostering innovation within the BWS ecosystem. Bounty Payments Developers whose projects are selected for integration with BWS will receive bounty payments based on their complexity and impact. Recognition and Exposure Featured projects will be showcased on the BWS website, social media, and promotional channels, giving developers visibility and recognition within the blockchain community. Technical Support and Resources The BWS team will provide developers access to technical support, detailed documentation, and resources to streamline development. API Fees Once your application is published, you will receive a fee in $BWS tokens every time your APIs get called. Read the BWS White Paper to learn more about developer grants and $BWS tokenomics. Next Quick Start Last updated 11 days ago Was this helpful?

paragraphs: Blockchain Web Services documentation.

By leveraging the Blockchain Web Services API, developers can seamlessly integrate blockchain technology into their offerings, providing their target customers with blockchain innovative solutions without requiring Web3 expertise.
Easily and affordably store data on the blockchain while receiving a Certificate of Trust for enhanced transparency.
A single API call to save data to the blockchain without passing your wallet or managing the transaction fees.
Effortlessly upload images and JSON files to the IPFS network and use our IPFS gateway for reliable access.
This solution is designed to create NFTs easily but also to transfer the ownership to non-blockchain-experts users that will now be able to experience the NFT revolution too.

Blockchain Web Services is not just an API but a set of platform protocols and development practices to enable the community to contribute and grow the solutions offering.

The following solutions offer mass market blockchain use cases targeting end-customers without Web3 know-how or setup.
Blockchain Badges elevate your credentialing system with secure, immutable digital recognition on the blockchain.
Engage your fans and get a new revenue stream for your Sports Club by combining NFTs and Machine Learning.
Assists financial institutions and system integrators in delivering environmental impact reporting to their digital channels.
A Telegram bot that helps community groups boost engagement on X (formerly Twitter) and track project's KOLs.

Recognizing the importance of building a vibrant developer ecosystem, we are excited to introduce the BWS Developer Grants—a program designed to incentivize developers to create tools and applications on top of our platform protocols, rewarding them for their contributions.
The initiative will maintain a development fund to support growth efforts, focusing on fostering innovation within the BWS ecosystem.

pages.title: Certificate Of Trust | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: Documents the Certificate of Trust feature provided by all BWS Solutions. Explains how blockchain-verified certificates demonstrate authenticity, trust, and transparency to customers. Generated automatically after operations complete, certificates display transaction information in an easily shareable format with BWS Proof of Registry.
useCases: Demonstrate transaction authenticity to customers with blockchain certificates
Share blockchain-verified proof of data storage with stakeholders
Provide transparent transaction records for compliance purposes
Verify digital credential issuance with immutable blockchain proof

pages.title: BWS.ESG.Credits | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: Describes BWS.ESG.Credits solution for financial institutions to integrate ESG impact reporting into digital channels and investment reporting. Supports ICMA frameworks, enables certification bodies to publish quality-assured impact data, and uses blockchain for secure, immutable storage of green investments, preventing double-counting and ensuring transparency.
useCases: Enable banks to provide ESG impact reports in digital banking channels
Help investment advisors integrate green asset impact data for clients
Publish quality-assured environmental impact data for certification bodies
Track and report carbon credits with blockchain-verified transparency
Prevent double-counting of green investments using immutable blockchain storage
pages.fullContent: BWS API Docs Ctrl k Contact Us Create Account Sign In More Welcome! Quick Start Platform Fees API How Tos Certificate Of Trust Media Assets PLATFORM APIs BWS.IPFS.Upload BWS.Blockchain.Save BWS.Blockchain.Hash BWS.NFT.zK Marketplace Solutions BWS.Blockchain.Badges BWS.NFT.GameCube BWS.ESG.Credits Solution Overview ESG Credits API TELEGRAM BOTS X BOT Powered by GitBook On this page Was this helpful? Copy Marketplace Solutions BWS.ESG.Credits For financial institutions that want to provide positive ESG impact reporting in their digital channels and investment reporting Author Status Contact Support BWS Ready https://www.greenassets.io/#contact-us BWS.ESG.Credits solution is designed to help financial institutions quickly integrate ESG impact benefits into their digital channels and investment reporting by leveraging investments in green assets. It serves banks, investment advisors, institutional investors, venture capitalists, and issuers of green assets by enabling the creation of detailed ESG impact reports for various stakeholders. Certification bodies can also use the API to publish quality-assured impact data. The solution supports ICMA frameworks and custom taxonomies, allows flexible impact calculations, and integrates seamlessly with blockchain for secure, immutable storage and certification of green investments, preventing double-counting and ensuring transparency. Previous Live Events Next Solution Overview Last updated 11 days ago Was this helpful?

paragraphs: For financial institutions that want to provide positive ESG impact reporting in their digital channels and investment reporting

It serves banks, investment advisors, institutional investors, venture capitalists, and issuers of green assets by enabling the creation of detailed ESG impact reports for various stakeholders. Certification bodies can also use the API to publish quality-assured impact data.

The solution supports ICMA frameworks and custom taxonomies, allows flexible impact calculations, and integrates seamlessly with blockchain for secure, immutable storage and certification of green investments, preventing double-counting and ensuring transparency.

pages.title: Platform Fees | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: Explains BWS platform fee structure and blockchain transaction costs. BWS handles all blockchain complexities including gas fees through token pools, charging customers in USD using 0.01 USD minimum billable units. Provides fee calculator, pricing examples, and information about $BWS token requirements for platform maintenance and developer community funding.
useCases: Run 100 free blockchain transactions on Mumbai or Sepolia test networks
Execute 1000 free testnet transactions after entering credit card
Create NFTs on Polygon with automatic fee conversion and billing
Track monthly blockchain credit usage through billing dashboard
Pay network fees in USD while BWS handles blockchain token conversion

implementationSteps.title: Free Testing Phase
implementationSteps.description: Test blockchain solutions for free using Mumbai or Sepolia test networks with 100 free transactions before entering payment information.

implementationSteps.title: Subscription Mode
implementationSteps.description: Enter credit card details to access 1000 free testnet transactions and enable mainnet operations with real-time fee trading.

implementationSteps.title: Monitor Usage
implementationSteps.description: Check billing menu to view current monthly cost and credit usage, with fees charged at 0.01 USD per blockchain credit fee unit.

pages.fullContent: BWS API Docs Ctrl k Contact Us Create Account Sign In More Welcome! Quick Start Platform Fees Fees Calculator API How Tos Certificate Of Trust Media Assets PLATFORM APIs BWS.IPFS.Upload BWS.Blockchain.Save BWS.Blockchain.Hash BWS.NFT.zK Marketplace Solutions BWS.Blockchain.Badges BWS.NFT.GameCube BWS.ESG.Credits TELEGRAM BOTS X BOT Powered by GitBook On this page Fees Calculator Pricing Example How do I pay those Fees? Was this helpful? Copy Platform Fees We take care of everything. Calling blockchain smart contracts requires funds: “It is the fuel that allows it to operate”. Fees compensate miners for their computational efforts in processing and securing transactions on the network. They are fundamental to the blockchain's sustainability, security, and efficiency, ensuring the network remains robust and decentralized. Blockchain Web Services (BWS) aims to transform the blockchain market by making innovative solutions accessible to a broad audience, including those without technical or Web3 experience. Fees Calculator Interacting with blockchain requires paying fees, so it's important to understand how Blockchain Web Services manages those fees to offer our customers the best user experience. In any scenario, we handle all the blockchain complexities. You interact with the blockchain(s) we support using our simplified API, and you don't need to worry about anything other than naming the blockchain you want to use. If you haven't entered your credit card, you can test our blockchain solutions for free using the Mumbai or Sepolia test networks. You can run 100 blockchain transactions for free. We use our token pools to pay network fees, and you are not charged. Using test networks does not consume $BWS tokens. Once you move into subscription mode by entering your credit card details, You can run 1000 testnet transactions for free. When running on main networks, we do real-time trading, convert US dollars to the required network token, and pay the fees for you. You will then be charged for those fees on your next bill, using 0.01 USD as the minimum billable unit. Every solution requires $BWS tokens to execute and fund the developer's community and platform maintenance. Please read the platform White Paper to know more about the $BWS token and its tokenomics. Pricing Example Suppose you subscribe to Blockchain Web Services and want to create 100 new NFTs on the Polygon blockchain using BWS.NFT.zK to create the NFTs, and BWS.IPFS.Upload to save your images to IPFS. Creating those 100 NFTs will cost you: Copy 100 IPFS Images, included = 0 USD 100 NFTs x 0.02 Network Fee = 2 USD Your next bill will show an extra 2 USD to your monthly plan. How do I pay those Fees? To check your current monthly cost, go to the Billing menu and check your credit usage. BLOCKCHAIN CREDIT FEE We use the Blockchain Credit Fee as the minimum billable unit, 0.01 USD. If, for example, you spend 2 USD creating NFTs, we will add 200 blockchain credit fee units to your next bill. Credits Usage balance. Previous Quick Start Next API How Tos Last updated 11 days ago Was this helpful?

In any scenario, we handle all the blockchain complexities. You interact with the blockchain(s) we support using our simplified API, and you don't need to worry about anything other than naming the blockchain you want to use.
If you haven't entered your credit card, you can test our blockchain solutions for free using the Mumbai or Sepolia test networks.

Creating those 100 NFTs will cost you:
Your next bill will show an extra 2 USD to your monthly plan.
To check your current monthly cost, go to the Billing menu and check your credit usage.

pages.title: Quick Start | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: Quick start tutorial for writing 'Hello World!' to blockchain using BWS.Blockchain.Hash solution. Demonstrates complete workflow: obtaining API key, making first API request to Matchain network, and fetching job status to retrieve blockchain receipt and Certificate of Trust. Includes code examples in cURL, JavaScript, and Python.

codeExamples.description: Write 'Hello World!' data to Matchain blockchain using BWS.Blockchain.Hash solution without managing wallets or gas fees
JavaScript example using jQuery Ajax to insert data into blockchain hash table
Fetch blockchain job status and results using jobId to retrieve transaction receipt and Certificate of Trust

useCases: Write first message to blockchain without Web3 wallet setup
Save data to Matchain network using simple REST API call
Retrieve blockchain transaction receipt and certificate of trust
Test blockchain integration with minimal code and no gas fee management

implementationSteps.title: Get API Key
implementationSteps.description: Obtain your API key for authentication as all requests without API key will return an error.

implementationSteps.title: Write to Blockchain
implementationSteps.description: Call POST https://api.bws.ninja/v1/smart-contracts/call with BWS.Blockchain.Hash solution to insert 'Hello World!' to Matchain, receiving jobId in response.

implementationSteps.title: Check Status and Fetch Results
implementationSteps.description: Use POST https://api.bws.ninja/v1/smart-contracts/fetch with jobId to retrieve completed job status, blockchain receipt, transaction URL, and Certificate of Trust.

pages.fullContent: BWS API Docs Ctrl k Contact Us Create Account Sign In More Welcome! Quick Start Platform Fees API How Tos Certificate Of Trust Media Assets PLATFORM APIs BWS.IPFS.Upload BWS.Blockchain.Save BWS.Blockchain.Hash BWS.NFT.zK Marketplace Solutions BWS.Blockchain.Badges BWS.NFT.GameCube BWS.ESG.Credits TELEGRAM BOTS X BOT Powered by GitBook On this page Get your API key Your First BWS API Request Write "Hello World!" to Matchain blockchain. Check for Status Fetch for the blockchain job status and results. Was this helpful? Copy Quick Start Writing "Hello World!" to the blockchain in just one call! Get your API key Your API requests should be authenticated using your API key (any request that doesn't include an API key will return an error). Learn how to Get your API Key . Your First BWS API Request We're going to use the BWS.Blockchain.Hash solution to save a message to the blockchain. Write "Hello World!" to Matchain blockchain. POST https://api.bws.ninja/v1/smart-contracts/call Let's write "Hello World!" to the Matchain blockchain network without managing network fees or Web3 wallets by calling a regular Web2 API. Request Body Name Type Description solution * string BWS.Blockchain.Hash version * number 1 network * string matchain operation * string insert parameters * JSON { key: "mykey", value: "Hello World!" } Please copy & Paste one of the following code snippets and run it (remember to use your API Key). curl Javascript Phyton Copy curl --location 'https://api.bws.ninja/v1/smart-contracts/call' \ --header 'X-Api-Key: API-KEY' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "solution": "BWS.Blockchain.Hash", "version": 1, "network": "matchain", "operation": "insert", "parameters": { "key": "timestamp: 1736418591440", "value": "Hola" } }' Copy var settings = { "url": "https://api.bws.ninja/v1/call", "method": "POST", "timeout": 0, "headers": { "X-Api-Key": "API-KEY", "Content-Type": "application/json" }, "data": JSON.stringify({ "solution": "BWS.Blockchain.Hash", "version": 1, "network": "matchain", "operation": "insert", "parameters": { "key": "timestamp: 1736418591440", "value": "Hola" } }), }; $.ajax(settings).done(function (response) { console.log(response); }); Copy import http.client import json conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.bws.ninja") payload = json.dumps({ "solution": "BWS.Blockchain.Hash", "version": 1, "network": "matchain", "operation": "insert", "parameters": { "key": "timestamp: 1736418591440", "value": "Hola" } }) headers = { 'X-Api-Key': 'API-KEY', 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } conn.request("POST", "/v1/call", payload, headers) res = conn.getresponse() data = res.read() print(data.decode("utf-8")) If executed correctly, check for jobId in the response body part. We will use it to verify that the blockchain operation has been completed correctly and to receive the blockchain transaction receipt and Certificate of Trust . API Call response Copy { "statusCode": 200, "statusMessage": "", "info": { "jobId": "59d0f46b-0b58-4972-8aca-51d06f69f25e" } } Check for Status To check for job completion and results, use the jobId you got from the previous call. Please note that interacting with blockchain(s) is asynchronous, so it may take some time for the operation to finish and for the blockchain receipt to be received. Fetch for the blockchain job status and results. POST https://api.bws.ninja/v1/smart-contracts/fetch Using the previous call response jobId we fetch the blockchain job started previously. Request Body Name Type Description jobId * String (use previously returned jobId, as for example 59d0f46b-0b58-4972-8aca-51d06f69f25e) Copy & Paste one of the following code snippets and run it (remember to use your own API Key). curl Javascript Phyton Copy curl --location 'https://api.bws.ninja/v1/fetch' \ --header 'X-Api-Key: API-KEY' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "jobId": "59d0f46b-0b58-4972-8aca-51d06f69f25e" }' Copy var settings = { "url": "https://api.bws.ninja/v1/fetch", "method": "POST", "timeout": 0, "headers": { "X-Api-Key": "API-KEY", "Content-Type": "application/json" }, "data": JSON.stringify({ "jobId": "59d0f46b-0b58-4512-8aca-51d06f69f25e" }), }; $.ajax(settings).done(function (response) { console.log(response); }); Copy import http.client import json conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.bws.ninja") payload = json.dumps({ "jobId": "59d0f46b-0b58-4512-8aca-51d06f69f25e" }) headers = { 'X-Api-Key': 'API-KEY', 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } conn.request("POST", "/v1/fetch", payload, headers) res = conn.getresponse() data = res.read() print(data.decode("utf-8")) You should receive a response indicating the completed job and the related blockchain receipt and certificate. Fetch API Call Response Copy { "statusCode": 200, "info": { "status": { "Value": "completed" }, "request": { "solution": "BWS.Blockchain.Hash", "version": 1, "network": "matchain", "operation": "insert", "parameters": { "key": "timestamp: 1736418591440", "value": "Hola" } }, "hash": "0xd5c51886e57b1b16e59bd866910f2c689728f9e4025a4abc14bf7b07ae21dcc8", "txnUrl": "https://matchscan.io/tx/0xd5c51886e57b1b16e59bd866910f2c689728f9e4025a4abc14bf7b07ae21dcc8", "certificateOfTrust": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/bws-backoffice-website-infra-prod/tx/matchain/0xd5c51886e57b1b16e59bd866910f2c689728f9e4025a4abc14bf7b07ae21dcc8.pdf", "certificateOfTrustJPG": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/bws-backoffice-website-infra-prod/tx/matchain/0xd5c51886e57b1b16e59bd866910f2c689728f9e4025a4abc14bf7b07ae21dcc8.jpg", "certificateOfTrustUrl": "https://prod.bws.ninja/tx.html?t=0xd5c51886e57b1b16e59bd866910f2c689728f9e4025a4abc14bf7b07ae21dcc8", "type": { "value": "blockchain-job" }, "timestampInMillis": 1736418605359, "id": "a89bf8bf-392b-4cc3-8ded-7dbe9d43c341" } } Congratulations! In just one call, you used BWS to save data into the Web3 blockchain ecosystem. Previous Welcome! Next Platform Fees Last updated 11 days ago Was this helpful?

paragraphs: Writing "Hello World!" to the blockchain in just one call!
Your API requests should be authenticated using your API key (any request that doesn't include an API key will return an error).

Please copy & Paste one of the following code snippets and run it (remember to use your API Key).
Please note that interacting with blockchain(s) is asynchronous, so it may take some time for the operation to finish and for the blockchain receipt to be received.
(use previously returned jobId, as for example 59d0f46b-0b58-4972-8aca-51d06f69f25e)

You should receive a response indicating the completed job and the related blockchain receipt and certificate.

pages.title: BWS.Blockchain.Save | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: BWS.Blockchain.Save provides an efficient solution for storing immutable data on the blockchain. This service enables permanent, tamper-proof data storage with blockchain verification and cryptographic security.
useCases: Store legal documents permanently on blockchain
Archive critical business records with immutable proof
Create tamper-proof audit trails for compliance
Preserve digital certificates and credentials
Save timestamped data for regulatory requirements

pages.title: BWS.IPFS.Upload | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: BWS.IPFS.Upload enables easy uploading of images, PDF documents, and JSON files to the InterPlanetary File System (IPFS). This service provides decentralized file storage with content-addressed retrieval for web3 applications.
useCases: Upload NFT images to IPFS for metadata storage
Store PDF documents in decentralized file system
Host JSON metadata files for blockchain applications
Archive media files with permanent IPFS links
Create distributed content delivery for web3 apps

pages.title: BWS.NFT.zK | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: BWS.NFT.zK simplifies NFT management by eliminating technical complexities associated with non-fungible token creation and administration. The platform supports NFT attributes and traits configuration for complete digital asset control.
useCases: Create NFT collections without blockchain expertise
Manage NFT metadata and attributes programmatically
Deploy digital collectibles with custom traits
Build gaming assets with NFT properties
Launch branded NFT campaigns for marketing

pages.title: X BOT | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: X Bot is a Telegram-based analytics platform that delivers accurate X (Twitter) engagement metrics using the official X API. It helps crypto projects measure community impact, enables KOL teams to showcase verifiable performance, and allows investors to discover authentic project traction without posting or accessing private data.
useCases: Measure crypto project community engagement on X
Track KOL performance and profitability metrics
Discover projects with authentic community traction
Verify influencer campaign effectiveness
Analyze social media ROI for marketing teams

Copy TELEGRAM BOTS X BOT X Bot is a Telegram-based analytics platform that provides accurate X (Twitter) engagement metrics using the official X API. It helps crypto projects measure community impact and KOL profitability, enables KOL teams to showcase verifiable performance, and allows investors to discover projects with authentic community traction. Built on the official X API to ensure accuracy and reliability in every metric. X Bot does not post or interact on X and does not access private user data—only publicly available post content is processed. Previous Users Next Overview Last updated 11 days ago Was this helpful?

paragraphs: X Bot is a Telegram-based analytics platform that provides accurate X (Twitter) engagement metrics using the official X API. It helps crypto projects measure community impact and KOL profitability, enables KOL teams to showcase verifiable performance, and allows investors to discover projects with authentic community traction.
Built on the official X API to ensure accuracy and reliability in every metric.
